DP.042.0000:
I got my PIKACHU through a trade
from somewhere in the world.\f
He grows quickly, his level’s high,
but he doesn’t listen to me...\f
It’s not always easy, but he’s still
my irreplaceable partner!
DP.042.0002:
If everyone around the world had
Pokémon...\f
Then everyone around the world could
communicate!
